sections.title: Technique
sections.default: AP and lateral views of the {laterality} knee were obtained. {skyline}

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The joint space is maintained bilaterally. No significant narrowing of the medial or lateral compartment. The bony margins are well-defined with no osteophytic lipping. No fracture or dislocation is identified. The alignment is normal. The visualized soft tissues are unremarkable.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No significant radiological abnormality of the {laterality} knee.

few_shot_normal.input: knee joint space normal, no osteophytes, alignment normal

output.findings: The joint space is maintained bilaterally. No significant narrowing of the medial or lateral compartment is seen. The bony margins are well-defined with no osteophytic lipping. No fracture or dislocation is identified. Alignment is normal. Visualized soft tissues are unremarkable.
output.impression: No significant radiological abnormality of the knee.

few_shot_abnormal.input: medial joint space narrowing, osteophytes, soft tissue swelling

output.findings: There is narrowing of the medial compartment joint space. Osteophytic lipping is seen at the medial tibial plateau and medial femoral condyle. The lateral compartment is relatively preserved. There is periarticular soft tissue swelling. No acute fracture is identified.
output.impression: Medial compartment osteoarthritis of the knee. Clinical correlation advised.
